So what we do here, we've got two different phases of how we work with clients.
The first is a strategy sprint where we're going to do deep research because the context that we feed into these workflows, it's the key for the content that we create actually being effective.
And so this means that we're going to create these artifacts, right?
Company context artifacts, persona artifacts.
And at the end of the day, what these artifacts are doing are helping us align on who are the personas that you're trying
What are the things that they care about?
What are their pain points, right?
What are their jobs to be done?
And then we're also going to create writing guidelines so that it matches the tone, right, that you might need.
We're going to feed this with call recordings.
We'll do expert interviews because, right, we don't claim to know everything about what you guys are building at Composio.
But then when we've got that created, we're going to map all of these different pieces to these topic clusters, right?
So think topic clusters as what are the bets that you want to make in terms of use cases, in terms of things that you want to create content around.
And then from there, we're going to create assignments and start executing on those assignments.

By week four, by week five, we're publishing.
And we've had clients where we've published, you know, 10 plus, 20 plus articles.
